title: Delete data and Language-tagged strings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph2 (subject VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), object VARCHAR(255), language VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO graph2 (subject, predicate, object, language) VALUES ('http://example.com/foo/bar/test/2', 'http://purl.org/dc/terms/title', 'test 1', 'en');
INSERT INTO graph2 (subject, predicate, object, language) VALUES ('http://example.com/foo/bar/test/2', 'http://purl.org/dc/terms/title', 'test 2', 'en');
DELETE FROM graph2 WHERE subject = 'http://example.com/foo/bar/test/2' AND predicate = 'http://purl.org/dc/terms/title' AND object = 'test 1' AND language = 'en';
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM graph2 WHERE subject = 'http://example.com/foo/bar/test/2';
key_bug_features: Batched DELETE DATA queries fail with language-tagged strings
